title: agrostis vulgaris var. hispida
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. hispida, also known as rough bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agrostis vulgaris var. hispida include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
